name: quality-engineering-skills
description: Curated marketplace of quality-engineering, test-automation, and SDLC plugins for Claude Code — ELITEA Next MCP, QA agents, test-framework skill bundles (qavajs, Vividus, Tosca), and the SDLC role-based agent toolkit.

plugins.name: elitea-next
plugins.description: Connect Claude Code to an EPAM ELITEA Next project over SSE. Reads project id and bearer token from a local .env file so the same plugin works across multiple projects/tenants without editing config.

plugins.name: qa-agent
plugins.description: Composable QA agent for AI coding assistants — multi-specialist analysis, exploratory testing, accessibility, security, test generation, with a /qa-init onboarding pipeline. Wrapper around onetest-ai/qa-agent's npx installer.

plugins.name: sdlc-skills
plugins.description: Bundled SDLC toolkit for Claude Code: role-based agents (BA, Tech Lead, PM, Python/JS/iOS devs, QA, Personal Assistant) and composable skills (bug-fix, feature planning, feature implementation, project seeding, code review, TDD). Use when orchestrating an AI development team or when you want structured SDLC workflows.

plugins.name: servicenow-atf-skill
plugins.description: Create, run, and inspect ServiceNow Automated Test Framework (ATF) tests programmatically. Two paths: the official @servicenow/sdk Fluent toolchain (.now.ts → now-sdk build/install) and a zero-install Scripted-REST builder (Path B) that bypasses the platform's glide_var Table-API filter on sys_atf_step.inputs. Universal batching rule: keep UI steps contiguous; batch server steps strictly before/after.

plugins.name: agent-evaluator
plugins.description: Evaluate AI agent specifications against the Agent Maturity Model (L0–L3, 39 practices across 9 categories) and produce a styled HTML maturity assessment report. Triggers on 'evaluate this agent', 'score these agents', 'how mature is X', 'audit the agent suite in folder Y'. Vendored from dshaplyko/skills.

plugins.name: qaspace-skill
plugins.description: Agent skill for the EPAM qaspace Test Management Plugin on Jira Server/DC. Discover custom-field IDs, resolve test runs, build folder trees, triage runs for automation, paginate large runs, avoid plugin footguns. Transport-agnostic — MCP, REST, or curl.

plugins.name: qavajs-skill
plugins.description: Agent skill for the qavajs BDD test-automation framework — 270 step patterns, full configuration and DSL reference, Playwright MCP bundled. Use when bootstrapping a qavajs project, authoring step definitions, or debugging test runs.

plugins.name: vividus-skill
plugins.description: Agent skill for the Vividus test-automation framework — bootstrap a project, configure profiles and environments, author scenarios, run suites. Bundles a Playwright MCP for browser-driven steps.

plugins.name: tosca-tsu
plugins.description: Bidirectional bridge between Tricentis Tosca .tsu test bundles and Playwright TypeScript specs. Generate .tsu from Playwright, parse .tsu into Playwright, drive the browser via Playwright MCP. Ships Claude Code skills plus Playwright MCP configs for VS Code, Copilot, and Copilot CLI.

plugins.name: toscacloud-cli
plugins.description: AI-native CLI for Tricentis Tosca Cloud — bundles a Tosca Cloud MCP server, a Playwright MCP, and Claude Code skills that drive the CLI for creating, running, and inspecting cloud test executions.
